objective: Standardize a reproducible Gemini CLI manual review workflow for KO mapping and TOPIK3000 POS so all agents can run the same audit path.

tasks.title: Publish mapping review runbook with minimal input contract
actions: Document canonical Gemini input as tid+surface+atoms only.
Document chunked execution path and anti-truncation policy.
Document post-processing and source_ref backtrace join rules.

tasks.title: Publish TOPIK3000 POS full-audit runbook
actions: Freeze input file list and output contract for POS audit.
Provide one reproducible Gemini CLI command and retry guidance.

tasks.title: Run manual POS review for TOPIK3000 i18n/base mappings
actions: Review mapping_nouns/verbs/adjectives/adverbs in content/source/ko/i18n/base with Gemini using a strict manual-review instruction format.
Flag wrong POS placements, probable dual-POS lemmas, and function-word leakage with evidence snippets.
Produce a reviewed decision log per lemma: KEEP current POS, MOVE POS, or ALLOW dual POS.
Output a machine-parseable correction backlog that can be consumed by KO-MAP-02/KO-MAP-03 and dictionary scripts.
deliverables: POS review report for i18n/base TOPIK mappings
Patch backlog jsonl for mapping updates
acceptance: All reviewed findings include reproducible evidence and confidence.
No unresolved WRONG/SUSPECT lemma is left without a disposition decision.

tasks.title: Establish KO Golden A1 (L01-25) POS/Segmentation Baseline
actions: Generate full minimal review inputs for A1 lessons (A1-01 to A1-25).
Run chunked Gemini review specifically focusing on segmentation correctness.
Normalize outputs and identify all remaining WRONG/SUSPECT cases.
Create 'golden' reference files for A1 segmentation that must not regress.
acceptance: 100% of A1 tokens have verified segmentation/POS.
Zero unresolved tokens or known bad splits in A1 golden set.

tasks.title: Establish KO Golden A2 (L01-25) POS/Segmentation Baseline
actions: Ingest A2 content from LLLO repo (L01-25).
Generate full minimal review inputs for A2 lessons.
Execute V5 Surgeon (Agent Review) to establish golden baseline.
Fix irregulars/honorifics according to V5 Protocol.
acceptance: 100% of A2 tokens verified against V5 Protocol.
Zero unresolved tokens in A2 golden set.

tasks.title: A1 Gold Standard Secondary Review (V5 Protocol)
actions: Audit A1-01 to A1-25 for V5 surgery compliance.
Decompose '세요', '이에요' and honorifics into atomic units.
Fix adjective/verb POS categorization based on V5 protocol.
Align phrase mappings with mapping_phrase.json.

tasks.title: Establish KO Golden B1 (L01-20) POS/Segmentation Baseline
actions: Generate full minimal review inputs for B1 lessons.
Run chunked Gemini review for B1.
Create 'golden' reference files for B1 segmentation.

tasks.title: Translate audit findings into rule-engine fix backlog
actions: Cluster findings by rule family and priority conflicts.
Propose minimal patch set with expected QA metric impact.
Run mapping pipeline to compare before/after unresolved ratio.
acceptance: Regression cases are documented and reproducible.
